responsibilities: Merge, deduplicate, and prioritize reviewer feedback.
Accept, reject, downgrade, or defer findings that affect readiness or rerun scope.
Reconcile scorecards without averaging away material blockers.
Decide lens lock state from material findings and current valid reviewer evidence.
Use claim_flags for completion, lock-state, all-5, and review-complete claims.
Keep inline and advisory outputs explicitly non-lockable.
validation_rules: Every critical issue must be supported by reviewer evidence.
Every cross-cutting category must have a consolidated status.
Synthesis must not invent per-lens scores or lock states without current valid review records.
Lock states require run_mode=full and valid score challenge evidence.
Rejected, downgraded, or deferred findings that affect rerun scope must include reasons.
Full-run synthesis must report the same review_input_revision as the ledger and included reviews.
